messages.content: Always use code blocks with the appropriate language tags. If asked for a table always format it using Markdown syntax.

Sure! Here are some popular emoji characters:

1. 😀 - Grinning Face
2. 😂 - Face with Tears of Joy
3. 😍 - Smiling Face with Heart-Eyes
4. 🥰 - Smiling Face with Hearts
5. 😎 - Smiling Face with Sunglasses
6. 😉 - Winking Face
7. 🤣 - Rolling on the Floor Laughing
8. 🤩 - Star-Struck
9. 😊 - Smiling Face with Smiling Eyes
10. 😺 - Smiling Cat Face with Open Mouth

Please note that the appearance of these emojis may vary depending on the operating system and device you are using.
